ActionPlanTemplate.description: Standard milestone tasks for an EIS-class NEPA review. Task due dates use ActivityDate offsets relative to action plan creation. Assign to IndividualApplication with Review Type = EIS.
ActionPlanTemplate.name: NEPA EIS Process Milestones

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Publish Notice of Intent (NOI) in Federal Register

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Publish the NOI in the Federal Register to formally initiate EIS scoping. Confirm submission, post to agency website, notify cooperating agencies. Due ~30 days after process start.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Complete Scoping Process and Issue Scoping Summary

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Close scoping period, compile comments, issue scoping summary. Identify range of issues and alternatives for the EIS. Document cooperating agency involvement. Due ~90 days after process start.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Complete ESA / Adjacent Statute Consultations

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Complete ESA Section 7, CWA Section 404, NHPA Section 106, and other adjacent statute consultations identified during scoping. Upload consultation documents to NEPA record. Due ~180 days after process start.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Publish Draft EIS with 45-Day Public Comment Period

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Publish Draft EIS with minimum 45-day comment period (60 days recommended). Upload to NEPA document record. Set comment period start and end dates on the process record. Due ~365 days after process start.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Close Public Comment Period and Log Comments

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Close comment period. Log all substantive comments as PublicComplaint records linked to the process. Begin categorizing for response document. Verify comment period end date is recorded. Due ~425 days after process start.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Complete Comment Response Document

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Prepare formal comment response document addressing all substantive public and agency comments on Draft EIS. Upload to ContentVersion with document type = Comment Response. Due ~530 days after process start.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Publish Final EIS and Begin 30-Day Wait Period

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Publish Final EIS and begin mandatory 30-day wait before ROD (40 CFR 1506.10). Upload to NEPA document record. Notify cooperating agencies and commenting parties. Due ~600 days after process start.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Sign Record of Decision (ROD)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Priority
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: High

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Sign ROD after 30-day wait from Final EIS publication. Upload to NEPA document record with document type = ROD. Set process completion date and update status to Completed. Due ~640 days after process start.
